This template is for representatives of [Anomaly Innovations Inc.](https://anoma.ly) to respond formally to this public disclosure.

This repository was created because no responsible disclosure channel (security contact, security policy, or bug bounty programme) was identified for Anomaly or the OpenCode Zen provider at the time of the incident on April 2, 2026. This issue is the offered contact point.
